name: pacifica-flow
description: Pacifica-native analytics, wallet intelligence, copy trading, and workflow control platform

scripts.worker:wallet-indexer: PACIFICA_SERVICE=api PACIFICA_WS_ENABLED=false PACIFICA_SNAPSHOT_ENABLED=false PACIFICA_GLOBAL_KPI_ENABLED=false PACIFICA_INDEXER_ENABLED=true PACIFICA_INDEXER_RUNNER_ENABLED=true PACIFICA_ONCHAIN_ENABLED=false PACIFICA_ONCHAIN_RUNNER_ENABLED=false PACIFICA_INDEXER_DISCOVERY_ONLY=false node server.js
scripts.worker:live-positions: PACIFICA_SERVICE=api PACIFICA_WS_ENABLED=false PACIFICA_SNAPSHOT_ENABLED=false PACIFICA_GLOBAL_KPI_ENABLED=false PACIFICA_INDEXER_ENABLED=false PACIFICA_INDEXER_RUNNER_ENABLED=false PACIFICA_ONCHAIN_ENABLED=false PACIFICA_ONCHAIN_RUNNER_ENABLED=false PACIFICA_LIVE_WALLET_FIRST_ENABLED=true node server.js
scripts.worker:onchain-discovery: PACIFICA_SERVICE=api PACIFICA_WS_ENABLED=false PACIFICA_SNAPSHOT_ENABLED=false PACIFICA_GLOBAL_KPI_ENABLED=false PACIFICA_INDEXER_ENABLED=false PACIFICA_INDEXER_RUNNER_ENABLED=false PACIFICA_ONCHAIN_ENABLED=true PACIFICA_ONCHAIN_RUNNER_ENABLED=true node server.js
scripts.worker:global-kpi: PACIFICA_SERVICE=api PACIFICA_WS_ENABLED=false PACIFICA_SNAPSHOT_ENABLED=false PACIFICA_GLOBAL_KPI_ENABLED=true PACIFICA_INDEXER_ENABLED=false PACIFICA_INDEXER_RUNNER_ENABLED=false PACIFICA_ONCHAIN_ENABLED=false PACIFICA_ONCHAIN_RUNNER_ENABLED=false PACIFICA_SOLANA_LOG_TRIGGER_ENABLED=false node server.js
scripts.service:ui-api: PACIFICA_SERVICE=all PACIFICA_INDEXER_ENABLED=false PACIFICA_INDEXER_RUNNER_ENABLED=false PACIFICA_ONCHAIN_ENABLED=false PACIFICA_ONCHAIN_RUNNER_ENABLED=false PACIFICA_SNAPSHOT_ENABLED=false PACIFICA_GLOBAL_KPI_ENABLED=false PACIFICA_MULTI_EGRESS_ENABLED=false PACIFICA_GLOBAL_KPI_USE_MULTI_EGRESS=false node server.js
scripts.start:onchain-lite: PORT=3400 PACIFICA_SERVICE=api PACIFICA_WS_ENABLED=false SOLANA_RPC_RATE_LIMIT_CAPACITY=3 PACIFICA_ONCHAIN_SIGNATURE_PAGE_LIMIT=20 PACIFICA_ONCHAIN_TX_CONCURRENCY=1 PACIFICA_ONCHAIN_MAX_TX_PER_CYCLE=12 node server.js
